title: Firstrade 定 Charles Schwab (FT vs CS) (4)

replies.msg:
Barclays International, Charles Schwab International 和Firstrade處理BN(O) passport之做法：

Barclays International:
佢問Nationality,
所以填United Kingdom

Charles Schwab International:
佢問Nationality,
所以填United Kingdom
（唔記得W8 form citizenship填什麼，好似填番Hong Kong)

Firstrade:
佢問的國籍，係想問Citizenship,
所以填香港(Hong Kong)
(W8 form citizenship也填Hong Kong
[當然你填”Hong Kong SAR, PRC”亦可］)

以上全部，TIN稅務居民no. is HKID card number.

預知未來者
SC 究竟係好用在係邊度??
有D唔識用個software
間公司大d，有自己bank
過錢返香港 $25 usd fre
FT 要 $35

可以ACH 去 transferwise ，再走錢
CS 點set ACH 去transferwise
去 CS webpage
Account -> external account -> add account

佢會叫你揀 bank ，鳩打一個英文字後，唔好理拉落底，揀自己打 account number

之後照返你 TW 個 USD inside US 嘅 bank details 入

等 verify deposits

齊 晒 verify 數，通常兩筆 CS to you, and 一筆 you to CS

好細數目，total 用你 $0

你見到 TW 有呢條來回嘅數，就去 CS external accounts 個位verify

咁就得
點解唔見you to CS
